content: Two viable approaches: (1) cross-rs via houseabsolute/actions-rust-cross - uses Docker containers on Linux runners, most reliable for complex deps, but requires Docker; (2) cargo-zigbuild - no Docker, simpler setup, but can segfault for some projects. For claudebar which has no native C deps beyond standard glibc, both work. Recommendation: use houseabsolute/actions-rust-cross which auto-selects cargo vs cross per target and is the community standard. Install: cargo install cross --git https://github.com/cross-rs/cross, or let the action handle it.
